intro.fr:
Je suis Callisto, 46 ans, basée à Châlons-en-Champagne.
Gérante chez GPO SARL, artiste du dessin numérique & créatrice IA.
intro.en:
I am Callisto, 46 years old, based in Châlons-en-Champagne.
Manager at GPO SARL, Digital Drawing artist & AI Builder.

behancePara.en: Behance — Callisto Artwork — Adobe portfolio (demo projects, paintover, pixel art, GPO / pinball, Inktober…). Tools: Photoshop, Illustrator, Fresco. Available for freelance work & open to new projects.

drawingDesc.fr: Artiste numérique depuis 2011, concours internationaux, et passionnée par la pratique !
drawingDesc.en: Digital artist since 2011, international competitions, and passionate about the craft!

gpoDesc.fr: Réparation, vente, location et fabrication de machines de loisirs — flippers, baby-foot, bornes d’arcade… Nombreuses créations et rénovations sur mesure depuis le premier jour.
gpoDesc.en: Repair, sales, rentals, and manufacturing of amusement machines — pinball, foosball, arcade cabinets… Many custom builds and refurbishments from day one.

demoDesc.fr: Membre active depuis 2015 — Shadow Party, Revision, Rsync, Inercia, Assembly, Tokyo Demo Fest…
demoDesc.en: Active member since 2015 — Shadow Party, Revision, Rsync, Inercia, Assembly, Tokyo Demo Fest…

aiDesc.fr: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude. Exploration et intégration d’outils IA dans le flux créatif.
aiDesc.en: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude. Exploring and integrating AI tools into the creative workflow.

devDesc.fr:

devDesc.en:

subtitle.fr: Mon plaisir, c’est DESSINER !!! TOUJOURS… et pour toujours.
subtitle.en: My fun is DRAWING !!! ALWAYS... and for ever.

text.fr: Nous utilisons des cookies et technologies similaires pour le fonctionnement du site (cookies essentiels) et, si vous acceptez, pour les contenus intégrés (ex. vidéos YouTube) et pour améliorer votre expérience. Vous pouvez refuser les cookies non essentiels ou en savoir plus dans les mentions légales.
text.en: We use cookies and similar technologies for the site to work (essential cookies) and, if you agree, for embedded content (e.g. YouTube videos) and to improve your experience. You can reject non-essential cookies or read more in the legal notices.

lead.fr: Les clients n’achètent pas seulement du code — ils achètent votre capacité à démêler des problèmes difficiles. Cette page est mon journal d’ingénierie public : contraintes réelles, essais infructueux, et ce qui a vraiment fait avancer le projet. (The Hacking Project / THP fait partie de la façon dont j’affine ce métier.)
lead.en: Clients don’t only buy code — they buy your ability to untangle hard problems. This page is my public engineering journal: real constraints, failed attempts, and what actually moved the needle. (The Hacking Project / THP is part of how I sharpen that craft.)

headline.fr: D’environ 5 s à ~1 s sur un appel API type OpenAI

3. Hosting

IONOS SE

4. Intellectual property

All content on this site (text, visuals, graphics, logo, structure, code) is protected by copyright and, where applicable, trademark law. Any reproduction, display, or use without permission is prohibited unless agreed in writing by the publisher or rights holders.

Portfolio works are the property of their author or subject to third-party rights (clients, partners) where applicable.

5. Personal data (GDPR)

The site is mainly informational. Contact details (email, phone) in these notices allow you to exercise your rights and reach the publisher. Messages sent by email or social channels are processed to respond to your request (legitimate interest or pre-contractual / contractual measures as applicable).

For any question about your personal data, write to callisto.gfx@gmail.com. You have rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, and portability under Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).

Complaint to the supervisory authority: CNIL — www.cnil.fr

6. Cookies and trackers

This site aims to limit cookies to what is strictly necessary. Third-party embeds (e.g. YouTube videos in iframes, Google Fonts) may set cookies or collect data under their own policies.

A consent banner is shown on the first visit: you can accept all cookies and trackers offered, or refuse those that are not strictly necessary. Your choice is stored locally on your device (localStorage). You can change it anytime via the “Cookie settings” link in the portfolio footer.

7. Limitation of liability

The publisher strives to keep published information accurate but cannot be held liable for errors, omissions, or temporary unavailability of the site. External links (Behance, social networks, etc.) point to third-party sites whose content is outside the publisher’s control.
